title: scanner load_state hardcodes account 0 in spendable_notes call
description: wallet/src/scanner.rs load_state calls self.store.spendable_notes(0) hardcoding account 0. This is inconsistent with the scanner having no account parameter — the scanner's witness map should be loaded for all accounts, not silently scoped to account 0. When multi-account support is added (notes.account_index column), this call will silently miss all witnesses for accounts > 0, leaving their notes unspendable. Trigger: multi-account wallet restart. Bad behavior: witnesses for accounts 1..N are not restored in-memory; those notes become permanently unspendable until rescan. Fix: pass account as a field on CompactBlockScanner, or call spendable_notes for all known accounts.
